\tzpentry{ID3465}{Bessel Spectral Gap Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3465 introduces Bessel Spectral Gap Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Delta_{\text{Bessel}}[f](z) \;=\; \sum_{\nu}\; \big( J_{\nu+\tfrac12}(z) - J_{\nu}(z)\big)\; \mathrm{d}z^\nu \]
